zh.Sudbury, Suffolk, England: 英國素福爾可素德波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Ruggles於1522年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可素德波利時，他的父親Thomas Ruggles25歲，母親Mrs Thomas Ruggles22歲。他於大約1547年與Mrs Nicholas Ruggles在英國素福爾可素德波利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Ruggles于1522年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可素德波利时，他的父亲Thomas Ruggles25岁，母亲Mrs Thomas Ruggles22岁。他于大约1547年与Mrs Nicholas Ruggles在英国素福爾可素德波利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Ruggles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Essex): variant of the now extinct surname Ruggle, with post-medieval excrescent -s. The origin of Ruggle is uncertain. It could be a variant of the Suffolk and Essex name Ricold with voicing of /k/ to /g/ and the same vowel change as seen in Smoothy for Smithey (another Suffolk and Essex name) and in Puckering for Pickering .
History: The founder of this influential American family was Thomas Ruggles (1584–1644) of Sudbury, Suffolk, England, who settled in Roxbury, MA, in 1637.

variants.name: Smithey
meanings: English (Yorkshire): from Middle English smithi ‘smithy, forge’ (Old Norse smithja), used either as a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a blacksmith's shop, or an occupational name for someone who worked in one. Compare Smith and Smead .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Ruggles was born in 1522, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Ruggles, was 25 and his mother, Mrs Thomas Ruggles, was 22. He married Mrs Nicholas Ruggles about 1547, in Sudbury, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Ruggles est né en 1522, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Ruggles, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mrs Thomas Ruggles, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Nicholas Ruggles environ 1547, à Sudbury, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Ruggles 1522 in Sudbury, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Ruggles 25 und seine Mutter Mrs Thomas Ruggles 22. Er hat um 1547 in Sudbury, Suffolk, England Mrs Nicholas Ruggles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Ruggles è nato il nel 1522 nel Sudbury, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Ruggles, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Thomas Ruggles, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Nicholas Ruggles circa 1547, nel Sudbury, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Rugglesが1522年にイギリスイギリススフォルクスドブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Rugglesは25歳，母Mrs Thomas Rugglesは22歳であった。約1547年にイギリススフォルクスドブリーでMrs Nicholas Rugglesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Ruggles(이)가 1522년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 수드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Ruggles(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Thomas Ruggles(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1547년 영국 수폴크 수드버이에서 Mrs Nicholas Ruggles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Ruggles nasceu em 1522, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Ruggles, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Thomas Ruggles, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Nicholas Ruggles aproximadamente 1547, em Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Ruggles родился в 1522 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Ruggles было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Thomas Ruggles, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Nicholas Ruggles около 1547 г. в местности судбури, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Ruggles nació en 1522, en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Ruggles, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mrs Thomas Ruggles, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mrs Nicholas Ruggles aproximadamente 1547, en Sudbury, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija.
